description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for Windows KnobKraft Orm that triggers on push. Run a windows-2019 job that checks out the repository with tags and submodules, sets up Python 3.8 x64, installs NuGet and Innosetup, runs Python tests, builds and installs Sentry, patches JUCE, configures and builds with CMake, publishes a release, and optionally sets up Sentry CLI and uploads PDB files, extracts and uses a private key for updating, and updates appcast.xml.
